title: Microcoelia megalorrhiza
taxonomy: Microcoelia megalorrhiza is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Microcoelia and the family Orchidaceae. Microcoelia megalorrhiza is a type of mycoheterotrophic orchid that obtains its nutrients by parasitizing fungi associated with plant roots. The species is native to tropical regions of Africa. Microcoelia megalorrhiza is often found in shaded, humid environments.
uses: Microcoelia megalorrhiza is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, where it is believed to have various health benefits.
